name: HWU Large-diameter Ultrasonic IoT Water Meter
desc: Large-diameter IoT ultrasonic water meter, DN40–DN300, R50, no moving parts, 15–20 year lifespan, NB-IoT/4G/M-Bus/RS485, IP68.
overview: The HWU Large-diameter Ultrasonic IoT Water Meter applies the same transit-time ultrasonic principle to larger pipes. No moving parts — service life typically 15–20 years with low maintenance cost. Low start-up flow rate (0.0015 m³/h). Intelligent features include flow volume alarm, leakage alert, abnormal flow detection and remote meter reading. Multi-channel configuration available.
features: No moving mechanical parts — typical service life 15–20 years, unaffected by impurities in water
Very low start-up flow (0.0015 m³/h) for accurate billing at near-zero consumption
Multi-channel configuration: 1, 2 or 4 ultrasonic channels for any pipe size
Intelligent monitoring: leakage alerts, reverse flow alarm, abnormal-flow detection
Ultra-low power technology — long battery life, low running cost
Multiple communication options: NB-IoT, 4G, M-Bus, RS485 for centralised reading
